description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, logging into the GitLab Container Registry in a before_script via echo "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" | docker login --username "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" --password-stdin "$CI_REGISTRY". Define variables DEBIAN_VERSION=jessie-20180426, DEVUAN_RELEASE=beowulf, DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR=/certs, LC_ALL=C, TZ=UTC and three stages: migrate, build, derive. Add a migrate job in the migrate stage that runs ./migrate.sh. Add five build jobs (build:ascii, build:beowulf, build:ceres, build:chimaera, build:jessie) in the build stage each running ./build.sh <name>. Add five derive jobs (derive:ascii, derive:beowulf, derive:ceres, derive:chimaera, derive:jessie) in the derive stage each running ./derive.sh <name>. No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
